cases.passage: Apple Inc. is a multinational technology company that designs, manufactures, and markets consumer electronics, computer software, and online services. It was founded in 1976 by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne. Apple's business model is based on designing, manufacturing, and marketing its own products, such as iPhones, iPads, MacBooks, and Apple Watches. The company operates globally with a strong presence in the United States, Europe, and Asia. Apple's products are known for their innovative design, user-friendly interface, and high-quality performance. The company has a strong brand image and is considered one of the most valuable companies in the world.

questions.q: What type of business model does Apple Inc. follow?
questions.explanation: Apple Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets its own products, which is a characteristic of a product-based business model.

questions.q: Where does Apple Inc. operate globally?
opts: (D) In the United States, Europe, and Asia
questions.explanation: Apple Inc. operates globally with a strong presence in the United States, Europe, and Asia.

questions.q: What is Apple Inc. known for?
questions.explanation: Apple's products are known for their innovative design, user-friendly interface, and high-quality performance.

opts: (A) Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak only

cases.passage: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) is an Indian multinational information technology (IT) service and consulting company headquartered in Mumbai, India. It was founded in 1968 by J.R.D. Tata. TCS provides IT services to various industries, including financial services, healthcare, and manufacturing. The company has a strong presence in the global market and has operations in over 50 countries. TCS has a large workforce of over 500,000 employees and is considered one of the largest IT companies in the world.

questions.q: Where is Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) headquartered?
questions.explanation: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) is an Indian multinational information technology (IT) service and consulting company headquartered in Mumbai, India.

questions.q: What type of company is Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)?
questions.explanation: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) provides IT services to various industries, which is a characteristic of a service-based company.

questions.q: How many countries does Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) operate in?
questions.explanation: The company has a strong presence in the global market and has operations in over 50 countries.

questions.q: What is the workforce size of Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)?
questions.explanation: TCS has a large workforce of over 500,000 employees and is considered one of the largest IT companies in the world.
Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) was founded in 1968 by J.R.D. Tata.
